description: Local-first semantic memory: index documents, search semantically, list/delete collections. All data stays local. Search output is sanitized against prompt injection.

text.description: Text content to index (required for index action)

source.description: Source label for the indexed content (e.g., filename, URL). Also used as filter on search (only return passages from this source).

n.description: Number of search results to return (default: 5)

threshold.description: Minimum similarity score (0-1) for search results (default: 0.0)

name.description: Collection name to delete (required for delete action)

test_source:
from tool import run

def test_missing_action():
    result = run({})
    assert 'error' in result

def test_unknown_action():
    result = run({'action': 'foobar'})
    assert 'error' in result

def test_index_no_text():
    result = run({'action': 'index'})
    assert 'error' in result

def test_search_no_query():
    result = run({'action': 'search'})
    assert 'error' in result

def test_delete_no_name():
    result = run({'action': 'delete'})
    assert 'error' in result

def test_list():
    result = run({'action': 'list'})
    assert 'error' not in result
    assert 'collections' in result

def test_index_and_search():
    run({'action': 'index', 'text': 'The capital of France is Paris', 'source': 'test_geo'})
    result = run({'action': 'search', 'query': 'French capital'})
    assert 'results' in result
    assert len(result['results']) > 0

def test_search_source_filter():
    run({'action': 'index', 'text': 'Python is a programming language', 'source': 'wiki_py'})
    run({'action': 'index', 'text': 'Python is also a snake', 'source': 'wiki_py'})
    run({'action': 'index', 'text': 'Erlang runs on the BEAM', 'source': 'wiki_erlang'})
    result = run({'action': 'search', 'query': 'programming language', 'source': 'wiki_erlang'})
    for r in result.get('results', []):
        assert r.get('source') == 'wiki_erlang'
    # cleanup
    run({'action': 'delete', 'name': 'default'})

def test_sanitize_untagged():
    result = run({'action': 'search', 'query': 'French capital'})
    assert 'error' not in result
